name: Postal Place PDX PackageHub Business Centers & Idemia
description_short: Postal Place PDX PackageHub is a multi-service business center in Portland, OR offering shipping, mailbox rentals, notary services, fingerprinting, and document services—not check-cashing.
description_long:
Postal Place PDX PackageHub Business Center operates as a comprehensive business services hub located at 10350 N Vancouver Way in Portland, Oregon. The company positions itself as a one-stop resource for shipping, mailing, printing, and business support needs for both residents and businesses in the Portland area. Despite being categorized as check-cashing on CreditDoc, the company's actual business model centers on shipping logistics and business services rather than financial services like check-cashing or money orders.

The company offers an extensive range of services spanning shipping and logistics (FedEx, UPS, USPS, DHL, and Express package drop-offs), mailbox solutions (virtual and traditional mailbox rentals with street addresses), document services (copying, printing, scanning, and shredding), and professional services including notary public, fingerprinting, and computer/internet terminal rentals. Their pickup schedule accommodates multiple carriers throughout the week, with extended hours on weekdays (8 AM–4 PM) and limited weekend service.

Postal Place PDX distinguishes itself by marketing its professional expertise, "Super-Star Customer Care," and positioning as a time-saving alternative to visiting multiple service providers. They emphasize competitive pricing on fingerprinting services and provide integrated carrier partnerships, allowing customers to manage multiple shipping needs from a single location. The company also caters to business professionals needing virtual office solutions through their mailbox rental services.

However, the categorization as check-cashing appears inaccurate based on available website content. No evidence exists of check-cashing, money order, wire transfer, or bill payment services—the core functions that define the check-cashing category. The company should be recategorized as a business services center or shipping/logistics provider, as this accurately reflects its primary revenue streams and customer value proposition.
pros: Multi-carrier shipping access (FedEx, UPS, USPS, DHL) with convenient drop-off from single location
Private mailbox rentals with street addresses instead of P.O. boxes, useful for privacy and business purposes
On-site notary public services for legal documents, contracts, real estate papers, and affidavits
Professional fingerprinting services at competitive Portland-area pricing
Extended weekday hours (8 AM–4 PM) and Saturday service until 2 PM
Document services including scanning, copying, printing, and shredding
Computer and internet terminal rentals for customers needing email, printing, or resume work
cons: No check-cashing, money orders, or wire transfer services despite current category classification
Limited Sunday availability (closed entirely) reduces accessibility for weekend business needs
No evidence of bill payment services or other financial transaction capabilities
Computer/internet rental feature may be becoming obsolete given modern smartphone and cloud access
Service offerings are fragmented across logistics, document services, and professional services rather than deep expertise in any single area
best_for: Small business owners needing virtual office solutions and shipping consolidation
Individuals requiring private mailbox addresses for privacy or business purposes
Remote workers or gig economy participants needing occasional computer/printing access
Portland residents and businesses handling multi-carrier shipping needs
diagnosis: Postal Place PDX PackageHub is a business services center best suited for small business owners, remote workers, and Portland residents needing integrated shipping, mailbox, and document services. The critical caveat is that this company does not offer check-cashing, money orders, wire transfers, or bill payment services—its current CreditDoc categorization is inaccurate and should be corrected to reflect its actual business model as a shipping and business services provider.
services: Private mailbox rental with street address
